# ITU Special Publication (Operational Bulletin) - Pass
# Round-trip canonical forms only. Legacy forms (ITU-T OB.X,
# Operational Bulletin No. X) normalize to "ITU OB No. X" and are
# covered by special_publication_spec.rb instead of round-trip fixtures.

ITU OB No. 100
ITU OB No. 1096
ITU OB No. 1283
ITU OB No. 1283 (01/2024)
ITU OB No. 1096 (03/2016)
ITU OB No. 1000-F
ITU OB No. 1000-S

ITU OB No. 1000-A
